title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 201.080 - Federal funds to be transmitted to service
text:
201.080.  Federal funds to be transmitted to service. — All funds allocated by the federal government to this state for the treatment and care of children with special health care needs shall be transmitted to the service.
(L. 1959 S.B. 368 § 10, A.L. 2010 H.B. 1270)
